title: Sisymbrium lipskyi

taxonomy: Sisymbrium lipskyi is classified within the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as mustard or cabbage family. This classification places it among the flowering plants, specifically within the order Brassicales. Further, it is placed within the genus Sisymbrium, a group of annual or biennial plants native to temperate regions. The species Sisymbrium lipskyi is considered to be endemic to certain parts of Central Asia. Its classification reflects its botanical relationships within the larger plant kingdom.
